messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

Improper input validation in TrustZone memory transfer interface can lead to information disclosure in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Compute, Snapdragon Connectivity, Snapdragon Consumer IOT, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Voice & Music, Snapdragon Wired Infrastructure and Networking

The improper validation of input within the TrustZone memory transfer interface may result in information disclosure across various Snapdragon platforms, including Auto, Compute, Connectivity, Consumer IOT, Industrial IOT, Voice & Music, and Wired Infrastructure and Networking.
